decision: Do not submit the new sitemap or request reindexing before the atomic production release passes immediate validation.
post_release_actions: Inspect the homepage and all critical service and cluster URLs after deployment.
Submit the canonical 119-URL sitemap only after the production crawl and canonical checks pass.
Monitor Page Indexing, Sitemaps, Crawl Stats, Core Web Vitals, Manual Actions, Security Issues, performance, and links for 30 days.
